content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Shadowsnovel.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] novel and [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|video game]] released in 1996]]

A list of events in '''1996''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 3: Escape to Hoth]]'' published.
*01 – [[Heir to the Empire 4|''Heir to the Empire'' 4]] published.
*01 – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' published.
*01 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 6|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 6]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 6|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 6]] published.
*01 – ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' published.
*[[January 15|15]] – [[Dove Cameron]] is born.
*15 – ''[[The Kathol Outback]]'' published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 9]] published.
*[[February 11|11]] – [[Brian Daley]] dies.
*[[February 13|13]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 5|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 5]] published.
*[[February 20|20]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]'' published.
*[[February 27|27]] – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 2|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 2]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]'' published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – ''[[Before the Storm]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]'' published.
*[[March 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire II]]'' limited-edition hardcover collection released.
*12 – [[Heir to the Empire 5|''Heir to the Empire'' 5]] published.
*12 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 6|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 6]] published.
*[[March 19|19]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' published.
*[[March 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars: Tales from Mos Eisley]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]'' published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 7|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 7]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 7|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 7]] published.
*[[April 23|23]] – [[Shadows of the Empire (soundtrack)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] soundtrack released on CD.
*23 – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 3|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 3]] published.
*[[April 30|30]] – [[Heir to the Empire 6|''Heir to the Empire'' 6]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 10|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 10]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 8|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 8]] published.
*[[May 2|02]] – ''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' published.
*[[May 7|07]] – [[Shadows of the Empire 1|''Shadows of the Empire'' 1]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Kathol Rift]]'' published.
*?? – [[Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Darkest Knight]]'' published.
*01 – [[Shadows of the Empire 2|''Shadows of the Empire'' 2]] published.
*[[June 23|23]] – ''[[Battle of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*23 – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] is launched.
*[[June 25|25]] – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 4|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 4]] published.
*25 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 9|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 9]] published.
*?? – ''[[Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook]]'' released by [[West End Games]].

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 0|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 0]] published.
*01 – [[Shadows of the Empire 3|''Shadows of the Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[July 2|02]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 10|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 10]] published.
*[[July 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal Collector's Edition]]'' published in UK.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 8|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 8]] published.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)]]'' published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Shield of Lies]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' published.
*[[August 7|07]] – [[Shadows of the Empire 4|''Shadows of the Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[August 8|08]] – ''[[Return of the Jedi (radio)]]'' released.
*[[August 14|14]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 11|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 11]] published.
*[[August 31|31]] – [[Shawn Valdez (real person)|Shawn Valdez]] dies.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: The Art of Dave Dorman]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[This Crumb for Hire]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Live-Action Adventures]]'' published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]'' published.
*[[September 4|04]] – [[Shadows of the Empire 5|''Shadows of the Empire'' 5]] published.
*04 – ''[[Classic Star Wars Box Set]]'' released.
*[[September 11|''11'']] – [[Heir to the Empire (TPB)|''Heir to the Empire'']] released as trade paperback.
*11 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 12|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 12]] published.
*[[September 18|18]] – ''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]'' published.
*?? – Pre-production of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] begins.
*?? – ''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]'' published.

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – [[Shadows of the Empire (junior novelization)|''Shadows of the Empire'']] junior novelization published.
*01 – [[Shadows of the Empire 6|''Shadows of the Empire'' 6]] published.
*01 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 1]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 9|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 9]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 13|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 13]] published.
*[[October 2|02]] – ''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' published.
*[[October 15|15]] – ''[[Luke's Fate]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 2]] published.
*01 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 11]] published.
*[[November 3|03]] – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'']] released on the Nintendo 64 platform in the USA.
*[[November 5|05]] – Premiere of ''[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|Return of the Jedi]]'': "[[Tatooine Haunts]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[November 12|12]] – "[[Fast Friends]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[November 19|19]] – "[[Prophecies and Destinies]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[November 26|26]] – "[[Pattern and Web]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[November 30|30]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' released on the PlayStation platform.
*?? – [[StarWars.com]] launched.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – ''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye (TPB)]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 14|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 14]] published.
*[[December 3|03]] – "[[So Turns a Galaxy, So Turns a Wheel]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[December 10|10]] – Conclusion of ''[[Return of the Jedi (radio)|Return of the Jedi]]'': "[[Blood of a Jedi]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[December 11|11]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 3]] published.
*[[December 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Game Secrets]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Endgame]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]'' published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – ''[[Gamemaster Toolkit: Live-Action Adventures]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[The New Rebellion]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Tales of the Bounty Hunters]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Instant Adventures]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars (Mighty Chronicles)]]'' published.
*?? – [[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']] published.

==Unknown==
*[[Aspyr Media]] is founded.
*''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Three]]'' published.
*''[[Heroes in Hiding]]'' published.
*[[Imperial Entanglements (West End Games)|''Imperial Entanglements'']] published.
*Publication of [[Star Wars (Semic/Egmont)|''Star Wars'']] begins.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 28|''Star Wars Insider'' 28]] published in Winter.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 29|''Star Wars Insider'' 29]] published in Spring.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 30|''Star Wars Insider'' 30]] published in Summer.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 31|''Star Wars Insider'' 31]] published in Fall.
----
